community.note: Citizen-corroboration overlay. Moderated, repo-committed field reports reconciled against the model as a priority/corroboration signal — never model input.

reports.note: Pole visibly tilted toward the road after the spring storm; base looks soft and split at the ground line.
Large limb resting on the primary; crossarm brace hanging loose. Reported during a feeder patrol.
Silver maple canopy growing into the right-of-way span, not yet contacting conductors.
Service drop hanging low over the alley after a vehicle clipped the guy wire.
Insulator chipped and a bird nest built into the crossarm; flagged for routine follow-up.
Unmapped location: leaning pole with heavy vine growth at a parcel that does not match a fleet pole id yet; coordinates captured from the in-app map.

meta.subtitle: DTE Energy · Hack Michigan 2026 · offline · public data · deterministic
meta.title: VISTA — Utility Pole Risk Profiling
